case_title: BEVERLY BROWN VS. CHRISTOPHER BRUNO et al

docket_entries.description: TRIAL RESET TO MAY-13-2009 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 MORE TIME, POSSIBLY TO SETTLE TRIAL OF MAR-05-2009 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-13-2009 IS OFF CALENDAR, NO SERVICE. NO APPEARANCE BY EITHER PARTY. JUDGE PRO TEM: MARK SCHREIBER. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).

DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE OF CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FILED BY PLAINTIFF BROWN, BEVERLY AS TO DEFENDANT BRUNO, CHRISTOPHER BRUNO, JOHN BROGNA, SHEILA JND PLUMBING
